passiveAbilities.name: Ancestral Sword
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2. If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Lucky
activeAbilities.description: Look at the top 5 cards of the Arcane Deck. Put any number on the top of the deck in any order and put the remainder on the bottom of the deck in any order.

arcaneAbilities.name: Magic Brew
arcaneAbilities.description:
[P]X: This model gains X energy.
[B]X: This model restores X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Shield Bash
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move this model 1” directly towards the enemy, then if base contact is made, move the enemy 1” directly away
